query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%')) as projects_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%')) as quotations_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE clientId IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%'))) as appointments_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%')) as projects_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE createdBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%')) as quotations_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE clientId IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%'))) as appointments_count;
